POPEYES LOUISIANA KITCHEN #179

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: January 14, 2026

A · 100/100 · among the cleanest kitchens in Orange County

Its most recent inspection on January 14, 2026 came back clean. Diners give it 3.5 across 1,310 reviews. It's a Seafood spot in Ocoee. Menus here flag options for dairy-free and pescatarian diners.

Get directions Call (407) 798-7570
